ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "study_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the study or examination */,
  "series_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the series of images */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used to capture the image */,
  "captured_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the image was captured */,
  "image_series_index" INTEGER /* Position of the image within the series */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., X-ray, MRI) */,
  "image_orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the image (e.g., axial, sagittal, coronal) */,
  "slice_thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the slice in millimeters */,
  "image_data" TEXT /* Binary data of the image */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Relevant medical history of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the patient */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnosis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis result */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image associated with the result */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Medical condition diagnosed (e.g., Atelectasis, Cardiomegaly) */,
  "probability_score" REAL /* Probability score of the condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the diagnosis was made */,
  "diagnosis_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the diagnosis */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_results_condition FOREIGN KEY ("condition") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_results_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_category" TEXT /* Category of the condition (e.g., disease, injury, infection) */,
  "condition_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the condition */,
  "condition_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the condition (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., CNN, LSTM, ensemble) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the machine learning model */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Training data used to train the model */,
  "evaluation_metrics" TEXT /* Evaluation metrics of the model (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "model_data" TEXT /* Binary data of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image associated with the result */,
  "result_probability_score" REAL /* Probability score of the result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was generated */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the result */,
  "result_confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, researcher) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the image (e.g., view, download, upload) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the image (e.g., desktop, laptop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
